title: Max Fashion is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Max Fashion is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!
